ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or identifier for the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device providing the measurement */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the power supply */,
  "harmonics" REAL /* Harmonic distortion levels */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the measurement point */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the measurement point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smart meter, sensor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power quality issue */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of power quality issue (e.g., voltage fluctuation, power factor deviation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_quality_issues_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power quality issue that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* User or system that the alert was sent to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES power_quality_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator) */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement used for analytics */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics (e.g., trend, forecast) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Analytics data */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analytics were performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics data used to generate the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)
